notes: Concept-teaching articles (template 4): The idea in one paragraph (plain English + real-market analogy, zero UI) / Why traders care / How it works (annotated-chart placeholder; math in a clearly-marked optional block) / See it in DeepCharts (link the indicators that visualize the concept) / Worked example / Common misreadings / Go deeper. Write for a smart beginner; no invented statistics; keep examples generic (ES/NQ futures). glossary: 30+ terms, each 1-2 sentences with [[links]] to the relevant concept/indicator article. Terms: delta, cumulative delta, bid/ask, aggressor, footprint, POC, value area/VAH/VAL, HVN/LVN, single print, TPO, imbalance, stacked imbalance, unfinished auction, absorption, iceberg, sweep, exhaustion, initiative vs responsive, speed of tape, DOM/depth, liquidity, front month, rollover, EOD data, tick/volume/range bars, RTH/ETH, workspace, template, sim account, prop firm, level 1 vs level 2 / MBO vs MBP, VWAP, orderflow.
